name: ConfigProvider
description: A context provider that manages global UI configuration including theme, locale, direction (RTL/LTR), and default component sizes. Wraps the entire application to provide consistent configuration.
usage_guidelines: Wrap at the root of your application.
Use to set default size for all interactive components.
Configure direction for RTL language support.
Access configuration in child components via useConfig hook.

value.description: Configuration object containing themeColor, direction, mode, locale, controlSize, and other settings.

styling_info.visual_description: No visual output — provides configuration context to all child components.

Do: Use useConfig hook to access config in components
Dont: Don't nest multiple ConfigProviders unless intentional
Don't modify config object directly, use the store
